sections.markdown:
- Activity: 傻猴奔跑🐒
- Started: 2025-02-01 19:24
- Distance: 8 km
- Moving time: 46:02
- Elapsed time: 46:06
- Elevation gain: 58 m
- Average heart rate: 179.2 bpm
- Max heart rate: 190 bpm
- Average watts: 197 W
- Average speed: 10.5 km/h

- Apple Health recorded `4` during-run heart-rate samples. Average HR was `181.7 bpm`, ranging from `170.6` to `187.0 bpm`.
- First-half average HR was `176.6 bpm` and second-half average HR was `186.8 bpm` (+10.2 bpm), which shows clear late cardiovascular drift.

- Apple Health cadence averaged `161.4 spm`, with a working range of `102.4` to `163.2 spm` after excluding `2` start-stop outliers below `100 spm`.
- First-half cadence averaged `161.6 spm` and second-half cadence averaged `159.8 spm` (-1.8 spm), which looks mechanically stable.

- Strava moving pace averaged `5:44 /km` across `8.020 km` in `46:02` moving time.
- Estimated first-half moving pace was `5:35 /km` and second-half pace was `5:54 /km` (+20 s/km), so pace faded meaningfully in the back half.

- Strava summary HR came in at `179.2 bpm` average and `190 bpm` max.
- Distance-split HR averaged `173.4 bpm` in the first half and `184.2 bpm` in the second (+10.8 bpm), which shows clear late cardiovascular drift.

- Moving time was `46:02` out of `46:06` elapsed (99.9%), which kept stoppage cost negligible.
- The downsampled moving stream shows `5` stop segments and `0.7%` stationary samples, so the run was mostly continuous with a few interruptions.

- Strava logged about `79.4 m` of climbing, with altitude moving between roughly `2.4 m` and `19.0 m`.
- Estimated climbing was `33.4 m` in the first half and `46.0 m` in the second, so most of the climbing landed later.
